generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired homeland security analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current laws leave gaps in protecting communities. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about overreach - it's about giving our brave officers the tools they need to keep us safe. Remember the 2024 Boston incident? That could have been prevented with better coordination. We owe it to our families to support reasonable updates to these laws. #PublicSafetyFirst #DutyToProtect
